name: Chow Fun Noodles
recipeIngredient: 2 each 12 oz. package of Chow Fun noodles (cut into strips)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add shrimp and pork; stir fry for 2 minutes until just cooked through.
3. Stir in seasonings and cook for an additional minute.
4. Add noodles and vegetables to the skillet; continue cooking for another 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Do not overcook vegetables.
6. Serve noodles on a platter, garnished with additional sesame seeds and green onions if desired.
